overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a scenic waterfront village during golden hour. The character walks along a riverbank past traditional wooden buildings, through wildflower meadows, wades through shallow water, and passes through a stone archway into open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path beside traditional wooden building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path beside a red wooden building with a stone tower

entered.detail: two-story traditional building with red timber walls and white-framed windows
cylindrical stone tower attached to the main building
weathered wooden pier extending into the water
small wooden rowboat moored at the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow waterfront path beside a traditional red wooden building with a stone tower. Wooden docks and boats line the water's edge to the right, while the building facade dominates the left side of the frame.

events.description: exits the built waterfront area into an open meadow with tall grass and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and wildflowers with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: large mountain with snow-covered peak visible in the distance
mature tree with spreading branches leaning over the path
dense growth of purple lupines and red poppies

segments.scene_description: Leaving the buildings behind, the scene opens into a wide meadow filled with wildflowers. A large leaning tree dominates the left side while snow-capped mountains rise in the distance ahead. The character continues walking along the riverbank through the tall grass.

events.description: character wades into shallow river water
character emerges from water onto sandy bank

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water and climbing onto the sandy opposite bank

entered.detail: clear shallow river water with visible sandy bottom
sandy and pebble-strewn river bottom visible through water
buildings and structures visible on the distant riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river, wading through clear water with a sandy bottom. After crossing, he emerges onto a sandy bank. The snow-capped mountain shifts to the right as the camera turns, revealing distant buildings on the opposite shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway entrance to open field

events.description: passes through ancient stone archway into open countryside

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore and passing through a stone archway into an open field

entered.detail: ancient stone archway with weathered columns framing the path ahead
rustic wooden tables and benches beside the path
stacked wooden crates and barrels near the archway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sandy shore, the character approaches an ancient stone archway. Wooden tables and crates line the path. Passing through the archway, the scene opens into a sunlit field with the snow-capped mountain now framed directly ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined waterfront village path into a vast, open mountain meadow. It begins by tracking the character along a narrow walkway beside a traditional red wooden building and a stone tower, with wooden docks and boats lining the water's edge. As the character leaves the structures behind, the scene opens and expands into a wide expanse of tall grass and vibrant wildflowers. The view then shifts to reveal a large leaning tree on the left and distant snow-capped mountains rising ahead, as the camera continues its steady progression along the riverbank.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shallow river crossing into a wide, sunlit countryside landscape. It begins with the character wading through clear water over a sandy bottom before emerging onto a riverbank. As the camera turns, a snow-capped mountain shifts to the right, revealing distant buildings on the opposite shore. The movement continues along the sandy shore past wooden tables and crates toward an ancient stone archway. Passing through the arch, the scene opens into a bright field with the snow-capped mountain now framed directly ahead.
